message:
chore: minor lint suppression and debug instrumentation

local_queue: Add #[allow(clippy::significant_drop_tightening)] to
Stealer::steal() — the mutex guard lifetime is intentional as the
locked arena must remain valid for the duration of the steal operation.

resolver: Add temporary debug println for ambient wake timeout test
diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
